title: NEET (UG) 2026 exam cancelled; new dates to be announced soon
content: NEET UG 2026 cancelled: The National Testing Agency has cancelled the NEET UG 2026 examination conducted on May 3 and announced a fresh examination after inputs reviewed with central agencies and investigative findings shared by law enforcement authorities. The Government of India has also ordered a CBI inquiry into the allegations linked to the examination. NTA said no fresh registration would be required for candidates, examination fees would be refunded, and revised exam dates and admit cards would be announced separately through official channels.

title: Himanta Biswa Sarma takes oath as Assam CM - what his cabinet looks like
content: Himanta Biswa Sarma has been sworn in as Assam's chief minister for a second term, marking a significant win for the BJP-led NDA. The grand ceremony in Guwahati was attended by Prime Minister Narendra Modi and other top leaders. The alliance secured a decisive victory in the recent assembly elections, reinforcing their strong hold in the northeastern state.

title: Sooryavanshi 'a slight liability in the field'? Former India batter flags RR
content: Sanjay Manjrekar expresses concern over Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's limited role as an Impact Player in IPL 2026. He argues that restricting the 15-year-old to just batting hinders his overall cricketing development, emphasizing the importance of fielding experience and pressure situations for a complete cricketer.

title: Venugopal, Satheesan or Chennithala? Cong high command steps in as Kerala CM race hits deadlock
content: The Congress-led UDF in Kerala is struggling to name its chief ministerial candidate over a week after winning the elections. Senior leaders are in Delhi for discussions, with Rahul Gandhi and Mallikarjun Kharge expected to make the final decision. Ramesh Chennithala, V D Satheesan, and K C Venugopal are the frontrunners amidst internal tussle and external criticism.

title: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang beats Michael Dell in 'world's richest' list days after Trump's praise
content: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang has surpassed Michael Dell on Forbes' real-time billionaires list, with Huang's net worth reaching $191.5 billion. This shift occurred as Nvidia's stock surged due to AI demand, while Dell Technologies saw a decline following President Trump's public praise and encouragement to buy Dell products.

title: Woman kills lover with ex’s help; son’s blood-stained notebook exposes murder plot
content: A blood-stained child's notebook, initially overlooked, became the crucial clue in a blind murder case in Madhya Pradesh. Investigators traced the handwriting and signatures to a tutor and then to a student's family, whose sudden disappearance led to their arrest.

title: A mother’s liver donation gave her 17-yr-old son a second chance at life
content: A mother's love proved stronger than fear when her 17-year-old son Armaan faced acute liver failure. Renu Khanna donated a portion of her liver in a life-saving transplant at Apollo Hospitals Navi Mumbai. Doctors successfully performed the surgery, and both mother and son are now recovering. This remarkable act highlights the power of maternal sacrifice and medical expertise.

title: Etihad Chennai-Abu Dhabi flight cancelled after fire detected on wing during take-off
content: An Etihad Airways flight bound for Abu Dhabi from Chennai was cancelled Monday after a fire erupted on its left wing during take-off preparations. Pilots promptly halted the aircraft, and all 280 passengers were safely evacuated without any injuries. Firefighters quickly extinguished the blaze, ensuring no further damage or casualties. The cause remains under investigation.

title: Meta to cut 8,000 jobs and CEO Mark Zuckerberg is making priorities clear for all employees
content: Meta is cutting 8,000 jobs on May 20 as CEO Mark Zuckerberg rebuilds the company around small, AI-powered teams. With capex hitting a record $125–145 billion this year, CFO Susan Li admitted there's no clean answer for what Meta's ideal headcount even looks like anymore. The company wants builders who can ship alone what teams once built together—and is letting everyone else go.

title: Why is stock market crashing today? Rs 5 lakh cr wealth wiped out - top reasons
content: One of the key triggers behind the market decline was renewed uncertainty surrounding the US-Iran conflict. US President Donald Trump said the ceasefire with Iran was “on life support” after Tehran rejected Washington’s latest proposal aimed at ending the conflict. Trump described Iran’s demands as “garbage.”

title: Quest for a rare bird, a landfill stop, & a deadly virus: How did 'patient zero' catch hantavirus?
content: A Dutch ornithologist, Leo Schilperoord, has been identified as patient zero in a deadly hantavirus outbreak on the MV Hondius cruise ship. Authorities suspect he and his wife contracted the virus from rat droppings during a birdwatching trip in Argentina. The outbreak led to multiple deaths and a global health alert.

title: Iran's IRGC planning to generate revenue from undersea internet cables in Persian Gulf
content: Iran is reportedly planning to charge hefty fees for undersea internet cables traversing the Strait of Hormuz. This move could impact global internet users with higher subscription costs and slower speeds. Tech giants may face new regulations and data sharing demands. Iran aims to leverage this for financial gain and digital influence.

title: Tamil Nadu CM Vijay orders closure of 717 liquor shops near temples, schools, bus stands
content: Tamil Nadu Chief Minister C Joseph Vijay has ordered the closure of 717 TASMAC liquor outlets within two weeks. These shops are located within 500 meters of places of worship, educational institutions, and bus stands across the state. The directive follows a statewide inspection aimed at stricter regulation and addressing public concerns.

title: Rs 12 lakh fine for Delhi captain Axar Patel after win vs PBKS
content: Axar Patel was fined Rs 12 lakh after Delhi Capitals maintained a slow over rate during their thrilling three-wicket IPL 2026 win over Punjab Kings. Axar scored 56 while David Miller added 51 in Delhi’s successful chase of 211. Madhav Tiwari starred with two wickets and a calm finishing cameo as Delhi kept their playoff hopes alive.

title: Suvendu aide murder case: CBI takes over probe from Bengal Police, forms 7-member team
content: The CBI has taken over the murder investigation of Chandranath Rath, an aide to Suvendu Adhikari, following a recommendation from the Bengal Police. Rath was shot dead by motorcycle-borne assailants in North 24 Parganas. Three suspects, including an alleged sharpshooter, have been arrested by the CID in Uttar Pradesh and Bihar.

title: Explained: Why Yuzvendra Chahal didn’t bowl vs DC?
content: Punjab Kings' bowling strategy faced criticism after Yuzvendra Chahal was not utilized in their three-wicket loss to Delhi Capitals. Despite a strong start, PBKS suffered their fourth consecutive defeat, with dropped catches and a strong partnership from Axar Patel and David Miller proving costly. The team's spin-bowling coach cited seaming conditions favoring pacers for Chahal's omission.

title: After 43 years, US family sold electrical company for $1.7B, gave workers $240M
content: A US-based businessman, Graham Walker, gifted his 540 employees a staggering $240 million from the $1.7 billion sale of his family's company, Fibrebond Corp. This generous act, where workers received an average of $443,000, stemmed from a condition Walker imposed before the sale to power-management giant Eaton.

title: Why CBSE's result coming soon alerts fueling anxiety instead of clarity
content: CBSE Class 12 Results 2026 are expected soon, but repeated “coming soon” notifications from DigiLocker without a confirmed declaration date have sparked anxiety among students. Many have criticised the uncertainty on social media, especially after past trends suggested results usually followed shortly after DigiLocker updates. Students are now demanding clearer communication from CBSE amid mounting academic and emotional pressure.

title: 'Very sensitive to criticism': Manjrekar makes big Virat Kohli revelation
content: Former India batter Sanjay Manjrekar believes Virat Kohli is “very sensitive to criticism” despite often saying he ignores outside noise. Manjrekar revealed Kohli sometimes became “cold” towards him after negative remarks. He added criticism may motivate Kohli to perform better. Manjrekar also praised Kohli’s aggressive leadership in Test cricket, calling him one of India’s greatest captains during his successful tenure.

title: Ranveer to play Lord Shiva in film adaptation of 'The Immortals of Meluha': Reports
content: Ranveer Singh is reportedly set to embody Lord Shiva in a grand cinematic trilogy based on Amish Tripathi's 'The Immortals of Meluha'. Singh's production banner has acquired the rights for this ambitious project, envisioned as a mythological universe.  Screenplay and world-building are underway, with filming for the first installment slated for 2028, following Singh's current film commitments.

title: Oil & gas royalty rejig: What govt big upstream reform means
content: The Indian government has rationalised royalty rates and methodologies for crude oil, natural gas, and casing head condensate to simplify regulations and boost the upstream energy sector. This move aims to bring greater clarity, consistency, and predictability to the oil and gas regime, encouraging fresh investments in exploration and production activities.

title: FIR filed against SP MP Ajendra Singh Lodhi over derogatory remarks against PM Modi
content: An FIR is filed against Samajwadi Party MP Ajendra Singh Lodhi in Mahoba, Uttar Pradesh, for allegedly making derogatory remarks against Prime Minister Narendra Modi. BJP leaders, including CM Yogi Adityanath, have strongly condemned the comments, calling them an insult to democratic values and demanding action from SP chief Akhilesh Yadav.

title: IPL Playoff Scenarios: With 15 matches to go, PBKS chances drop to 64.4%
content: With 15 league games left, Royal Challengers Bengaluru, Sunrisers Hyderabad and Gujarat Titans are favourites for IPL playoffs with nearly 88% qualification chances. Punjab Kings remain well placed despite slipping to 64.4%. Chennai Super Kings and Rajasthan Royals hover around 54%, while Kolkata Knight Riders and Delhi Capitals face slim hopes. Lucknow Super Giants and Mumbai Indians are eliminated.

title: US, UK sanctions target Iran-linked network accused of plotting attacks and moving funds
content: The US and UK have imposed separate sanctions targeting individuals, companies, and networks involved in Iran's oil sales, financial transactions, and alleged hostile activities. These measures aim to disrupt Iran's oil exports to China and cut off funding for the IRGC, while the UK focuses on shadow banking and destabilizing operations linked to criminal networks.

title: Rupee crashes to record low of 95.6 as US-Iran ceasefire jitters send oil soaring
content: The Indian Rupee hit a record low of 95.63 against the US dollar amid escalating geopolitical tensions and fragile investor sentiment. Intensifying Middle East conflict, rising oil prices, and sustained foreign fund outflows are pressuring the currency.  This economic uncertainty is also reflected in a significant dip in domestic stock markets.

title: UAE secretly joined Iran war? Report claims covert strikes hit key oil refinery
content: The United Arab Emirates secretly conducted attacks on an Iranian oil refinery last month, marking a new direct participant in the conflict. This action followed Iran's extensive targeting of the UAE, prompting a strategic shift in Abu Dhabi's approach to Tehran. The UAE possesses a highly advanced air force, fueling speculation about its involvement.

title: Horrifying video shows moment Frontier Airlines plane hits person on Denver runway
content: A shocking incident at Denver International Airport saw a person, who allegedly breached security, fatally struck by a departing Frontier Airlines jet. The collision ignited an engine fire, forcing an emergency evacuation. Several passengers sustained minor injuries during the chaotic scene, with the NTSB now reviewing the evacuation response.

title: 'Can't intimidate us with barbed wire': Bangladesh puts border force on alert
content: Bangladesh's foreign affairs adviser stated the nation will not be intimidated by border fencing, questioning the new West Bengal government's approach to governance. Dhaka warned of action against "push-back" incidents and asserted it would not remain silent if killings along the border continue, while Border Guard Bangladesh remains on high alert.

title: Why India turned down Russia's LNG despite Middle East-driven supply concerns
content: India has reportedly rejected Russian LNG cargoes under US sanctions, despite energy security worries. A sanctioned Russian LNG shipment is now stranded near Singapore as India navigates compliance risks. While India continues to import Russian crude, LNG is harder to conceal from global tracking systems. Discussions are ongoing for non-sanctioned Russian supplies.

title: Top stocks to buy or sell: Stock market recommendations for today
content: Stock market recommendations: Somil Mehta, Head of Retail Research at Mirae Asset ShareKhan has picked Max Healthcare Institute, and Coal India as the top stocks to buy today (May 12, 2026). AU Small Finance Bank is a sell call from the analyst.

title: Raining bills, rising barriers: Why America’s H-1B debate needs reform, not rhetoric
content: A surge of legislative proposals in the US targets the H-1B visa program, proposing significant restrictions and even abolition. While some measures aim to protect American jobs, experts warn against blunt policies. The article suggests reforms like Australia's skilled occupation list and Canada's points-based system could offer better solutions for attracting global talent.

title: 28-year-old cricketer loses life in horror car accident
content: British cricketer Jamie Spence, 28, died in a car crash in New Zealand alongside French national Raphael Jean-Gabriel Roellinger. Jamie’s club, Hull Strikers, paid tribute to his “energetic” and “passionate” personality, saying his spirit brought life to the team. Days later, the club played with 10 men and dedicated a seven-run victory to him, calling Jamie “one of the biggest supporters” of the club and “Forever a Striker”.

title: 'Beyond shameless': TMC attacks BJP, EC after ex-Bengal CEO appointed chief secretary
content: The Trinamool Congress has criticized the appointment of former Chief Electoral Officer Manoj Agarwal as West Bengal's Chief Secretary by the new BJP government. The party labeled the move "shameless," questioning the neutrality of the election process after Agarwal oversaw the recent Assembly elections.

title: Dubai don’s Delhi network busted: 6 shooters held after secret lounge party in Karol Bagh
content: Delhi Police crime branch nabbed six alleged shooters linked to gangsters Rashid Cablewala and Hashim Baba at a Karol Bagh lounge. The group was planning rival attacks and involved in extortion and illegal arms trade. Police recovered multiple sophisticated firearms and cartridges, with further raids leading to more arrests and weapons.

title: Tripura father who lost job over education clears Class 12 exam with daughter
content: A former government schoolteacher, Dudhu Miah, who lost his job in 2020, has now passed his Class 12 board exams alongside his daughter, Ruma Akter. After working as a daily wage laborer, Dudhu was inspired by Ruma to re-enroll in school. The father-daughter duo plans to attend college together, showcasing an extraordinary achievement and a testament to their determination.

title: Hantavirus-hit cruise ship leaves Tenerife as WHO completes evacuation operation
content: The hantavirus-stricken MV Hondius has departed Tenerife for the Netherlands after passengers and crew were evacuated. The operation repatriated 94 individuals, with three deaths reported since the outbreak began nine days ago. Health officials emphasize the low risk to the public, as the virus rarely spreads person-to-person.

title: Epstein files, Trump connections: New York pop-up puts it all on display
content: A New York exhibition displays nearly 3.5 million pages of newly released Justice Department documents concerning Jeffrey Epstein and his ties to Donald Trump. The pop-up library, titled "The Donald J. Trump and Jeffrey Epstein Memorial Reading Room," aims to expose corruption and dangers to democracy.  Organizers hope the display sparks public outcry for accountability regarding the document release.

title: Despite mediation role, Pak allowed Iran to use Nur Khan airbase to avoid American strikes
content: Pakistan reportedly sheltered Iranian military aircraft at its airbases, raising questions about its neutrality as a mediator in the US-Iran conflict. US officials cited in a CBS News report claim Iran moved planes, including a reconnaissance jet, to Pakistan's Nur Khan Air Base. A Pakistani official denied these allegations, calling them implausible.

title: Oil prices continue to boil as US–Iran ceasefire hangs on ‘life support’
content: Middle East conflict jitters are pushing oil prices higher, with Brent crude and WTI futures seeing gains.  Ceasefire talks with Iran are reportedly "on life support" following Tehran's response to a US proposal, which included broader regional demands.  The Strait of Hormuz, a vital oil passage, remains a key flashpoint, with Iran asserting control, raising concerns about global energy supplies.

title: Ball tampering? Afridi caught pressing ball with spikes, umpire steps in
content: Pakistan pacer Shaheen Afridi faced scrutiny during the Bangladesh Test for allegedly tampering with the ball, though umpires found no issue. The match saw Bangladesh build a lead of 179 runs by stumps on Day 4, with key partnerships and individual milestones reached. Both teams expressed confidence in chasing victory on the final day.

title: Trump all set for China trip, eyes 'great things' for both countries
content: US President Trump expressed optimism for his upcoming visit to China and meeting with President Xi Jinping, anticipating positive outcomes for both nations. Accompanied by prominent business leaders, Trump aims to discuss trade, Iran, tariffs, and AI, seeking to strengthen US economic and national security interests.

title: Senior ministers, more than 70 Labour MPs urge UK PM Keir Starmer to quit
content: More than 70 Labour lawmakers are reportedly urging Prime Minister Keir Starmer to resign following significant losses in local and regional elections. Four ministerial aides have resigned, citing a loss of public and parliamentary confidence. Despite mounting pressure, Starmer has rejected calls to step down, vowing to restore faith in his leadership.

title: Mike Vrabel–Dianna Russini affair rumors resurface after bonding clip
content: Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini might have strongly denied their affair rumors but it has only gotten worse. As Mike Vrabel resumed his professional duties, a recent clip of his with Dianna Russini has sparked outrage among millions as many question the duration of their alleged affair drama between them that is speculated to be brewing for a long time.

title: Chief Minister Vijay gives maiden speech in Tamil Nadu Assembly
content: Addressing legislators after assuming office, Mr. Vijay outlined his government’s priorities on governance, welfare, youth development and transparency while urging cooperation across party lines.

title: Himanta Biswa Sarma takes oath as Assam CM for second successive time
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi, many of his Cabinet colleagues, Chief Ministers of 22 NDA-ruled states, foreign delegates, industrialists, and religious heads attended the swearing-in ceremony

title: Returnable plots allotted to 98% of Amaravati land pooling farmers, says Narayana
content: According to official data, 63,295 of 70,824 returnable plots, accounting for 89%, had been registered while 7,529 plots remained pending

title: AICC begins consultations with Kerala leaders in New Delhi to decide on Congress’ Chief Minister candidate
content: AICC general secretary K.C. Venugopal, former Leader of the Opposition V.D. Satheesan and senior leader Ramesh Chennithala are reportedly the top contenders for CM’s mantle

title: In BJP-ECI's 'chor bazaar', bigger the theft, bigger the reward: Rahul's on WB Government appointments
content: The Congress has claimed that the appointments reflected the "brazen collusion and connivance" between the Election Commission and the BJP

title: Tamil Nadu CM Vijay orders closure of 717 TASMAC shops near educational institutions, places of worship
content: Of the 717 shops, 276 are located within 500 m from various places of worship, 186 near educational institutions, and 255 near bus terminuses

title: Suvendu aide Chandranath Rath murder: CBI takes over probe
content: The agency constituted a seven-member Special Investigation Team (SIT), comprising seasoned officers from multiple States, to probe the killing

title: PM Modi welcomes move to implement Ayushman Bharat scheme in West Bengal
content: Under the Centre's flagship programme, health insurance of up to ₹5 lakh is provided to each eligible household annually

title: ‘Cancel your own foreign tours’: Opposition leaders in Maharashtra slam PM
content: Mr Modi has appealed citizens to avoid foreign travel for a year, avoid buying gold, use public transport and electric vehicles [EVs], and adopt work from home

title: India declines Russian LNG under sanctions, talks continue on permitted cargoes, sources say
content: India’s reluctance has left an LNG cargo from ‌Russia’s U.S.-sanctioned ⁠Portovaya plant in the Baltic Sea unable to discharge, despite indicating India as ⁠its destination in mid-April

title: Assam CM Himanta Biswa Sarma’s political timeline
content: Himanta Biswa Sarma is the chief minister of the state and is widely credited with consolidating the BJP’s hold in the North-East.

title: TVK’s Tirupattur MLA, who won by one vote, not to take part in trust vote in Assembly: Madras High Court
content: Justices L. Victoria Gowri and N. Senthilkumar pass the interim order on a writ petition filed by DMK former Minister K.R. Periakaruppan

title: Gelatin sticks on PM convoy route: Timer circuit recovered by Bengaluru police
content: Police found not only gelatin sticks, but also an electronic circuit and equipment suspected to be meant for connecting detonators

title: Bangladeshi national sentenced to three-year imprisonment by U.P. court for forging Indian passport
content: Special Judge, Ballia, Ramkripal, on May 11 held Abdul Amin guilty and also imposed a fine of ₹10,000 on him, says Superintendent of Police Omvir Singh

title: SP MP Ajendra Singh Lodhi booked over ‘anti-national’ remark on PM Modi
content: The police action came at the complaint of BJP district media in-charge Satyendra Pratap Gupta, who accused Mr. Lodhi of stoking “caste hatred” with his remark on Mr. Modi

title: Malaysia, Tamil Nadu share deep ties, says PM Anwar Ibrahim; congratulates new Tamil Nadu CM Joseph Vijay
content: In a post on X, Anwar Ibrahim said that for many years, CM Vijay's "adoring fans watched him defeat corrupt politicians and assorted villains within three hours, usually after a short interval"

title: Federalism in the bin: Why India’s waste crisis cannot be solved by central decree
content: The Solid Waste Management Rules, 2026, disregard federalism and embody a technocratic vision of environmental governance, insufficiently attentive to ground realities; as framed, they risk producing blurred accountability, unproductive compliance work, and paper reporting rather than cleaner cities and villages

title: PM Modi’s call to stop foreign travel comes as spending in this area has already been falling
content: RBI data shows that the real growth areas in terms of foreign spending are purchases of immovable assets abroad and  investments in foreign debt and equity

title: Union Minister Pemmasani urges Nitin Gadkari to resolve traffic woes at Guntur bypass
content: Pemmasani also flagged a rise in road accidents in the area and stressed the need for immediate corrective measures in the interest of public safety

title: CBSE Class 12 results 2026: When and where will the marks be declared?
content: Approximately 1.8 million students are reported to have appeared for the exam in the 2026 academic session across Science, Commerce and Humanities streams from February to April

title: Split wide open in AIADMK, MLAs are divided over support to Palaniswami
content: Churning in AIADMK becomes evident as two groups submit letter backing Palaniswami and former Minister Velumani for Leader of the Opposition

title: China’s Foreign Minister to skip BRICS Delhi meet for ‘scheduling reasons’
content: China will not be sending any other high-level official for the meeting, the Foreign Ministry indicated

title: AIADMK faction led by C.Ve. Shanmugam declares support to TVK; says EPS wanted to be CM with DMK backing
content: We are no longer in any pre-poll alliance, says former Minister C.Ve. Shanmugam; it is believed of the total of 47 AIADMK legislators, 30 MLAs are with the group led by Mr. Shanmugam and S.P. Velumani.

title: Tussle over CM lays bare fault lines in Congress
content: Several senior Congress leaders and ordinary workers feel let down by the party’s insouciance. IUML, which spearheaded the UDF poll campaign successfully in many constituencies, has reason to be annoyed.  Congress’ central leadership should have anticipated the present scenario, more so with the AICC general secretary in charge of the organisation being in contention, and acted pre-emptively by laying out its criteria for the chief ministerial choice

title: CBI raids vigilance office in Punjab’s Mohali over alleged bribery racket; suspected 'middlemen' held
content: “A CBI team conducted the raid while probing an allegation of a bribe transaction of around 20 lakh,” officials said

title: Viral disabled woman video is misleading: CSMC Commissioner
content: A week ago, the encroachment drive was carried out in the area stretching from Seven Hill to Shahnoormiya Dargah Chowk to raze 170 illegal encroachments by pot sellers occupying footpaths and government land

title: J&K CM Abdullah retracts statement on liquor in face of growing criticism
content: Earlier, Mr. Abdullah, speaking on demands to ban liquor, said, “No one was forcing locals to consume liquor”

title: At Sankat Mochan Sangeet Samaroh, artistes of all faiths mark their attendance at Hanuman’s durbar
content: The 103‑year‑old Sankat Mochan Sangeet Samaroh reflects Benaras’s inclusive spirit, where devotion and diverse musical traditions converge in Hanuman’s temple.

title: Karnataka: Deficit pre-monsoon rainfall in 11 districts
content: Sixteen districts — Bengaluru Rural, Chickballapur, Kolar, Dakshina Kannada, Udupi, Chikkamagaluru, Shivamogga, Uttara Kannada, Haveri, Ballari, Koppal, Bagalkot, Belagavi, Vijayapura, Yadgir, and Bidar — received normal rainfall

title: Kerala Assembly polls 2026: AICC summons top leaders to Delhi to finalise party’s choice of Chief Minister
content: Those attending the crucial meeting with the party’s high command include former KPCC presidents K. Sudhakaran, Mullappally Ramachandran, V.M. Sudheeran and K. Muraleedharan

title: AI, GIS-enabled Kartavya-KAAMS app launched for attendance of school teachers, staff
content: It is mandatory for teaching and non-teaching staff to register attendance twice a day on the app from the place where they are on duty from the academic year 2026-27

title: GBA polls: Karnataka SEC appeals to Supreme Court for extension of deadline  by 3 months
content: The Karnataka State Election Commission had recently said civic polls in Bengaluru will be held between June 14 and 24.

title: How a bid to make Thirumavalavan Tamil Nadu’s Chief Minister failed
content: The idea of making Mr. Thirumavalavan the CM was mooted after a bid for an AIADMK Government with DMK support hit hurdles, a senior VCK leader told The Hindu

title: New excise regime comes into effect in Karnataka, liquor prices will be known on May 12
content: Clarity on IML/ Beer prices by Tuesday while prices of some labels have been notified. No distribution of IML/ Beer through KSBCL on Monday

title: Trinamool alleges continued post-poll violence in West Bengal
content: Abhishek Banerjee alleges statues of tribal leaders Sidhu and Kanhu Murmu have been vandalised in north Bengal

title: Will hear Trinamool pleas on victory margins being less than deleted votes in SIR, says Supreme Court
content: This is the first Supreme Court hearing in the West Bengal SIR case after the election; in as many as 31 seats, the victory margins of the BJP were less than the number of votes deleted during the SIR, Trinamool leaders say

title: Tech industry follows well-established hybrid work models: Nasscom in response to PM Modi’s call for work from home
content: “In light of the ongoing tensions in West Asia, companies have already adopted prudent energy management measures across campuses,” Nasscom said

title: Narasaraopet MP seeks key railway projects for Palnadu, Andhra Pradesh
content: During the meeting with Union Railway Minister, the MP sought approval for a new railway corridor connecting Piduguralla–Savalyapuram to Ramayapatnam Port

title: ECI set to roll out phase III of SIR in ‘coming days’ to cover 22 States, UTs
content: The poll authority had held back the exercise due to Assembly elections in Kerala, Assam, Puducherry, Tamil Nadu and West Bengal held last month

title: TCS Nashik case: NCW flags ‘toxic work culture’, ‘zero POSH compliance’
content: Deeply disturbing and toxic workplace environment marked by pervasive sexual harassment and abuse of authority at the workplace, says NCW report.

title: Supreme Court places Sringeri recount result in abeyance; restores Congress leader Raje Gowda as MLA for now
content: A Bench headed by Justice Sanjay Kumar ordered status quo ante while issuing notice to the BJP’s Jeevaraj and other respondents

title: PM repeats call for saving fuel, cutting gold buy; bats for work from home
content: “We must make every effort to reduce the use of imported products and avoid personal activities that involve spending foreign currency,” PM Modi said

title: Those who tried to erase Sanatan have turned to dust: Uttar Pradesh CM Yogi Adityanath
content: “Today, there remains no one to even recall the names of those invaders. The Sanatan culture is indomitable,” Uttar Pradesh CM Yogi Adityanath said

title: Himachal to link DC, SP performance ratings to drug control efforts
content: Himachal Pradesh Chief Minister Sukhvinder Singh Sukhu said administrative and police officers will visit at least ten educational institutions in their respective areas to create awareness among students about the ill-effects of drugs

title: Prosthetic foot centre set up in Trinidad; Jaishankar terms it gift of mobility
content: The Jaipur Foot Prosthetics Centre, set up by non-profit organisation Jaipur Foot USA, was inaugurated by External Affairs Minister S. Jaishankar during his visit to the Caribbean nation on May 9

title: PM’s Telangana visit: Did BJP internal wranglings upset Modi?
content: Sources within the party claimed that the Prime Minister was utterly unhappy due to persistent internal differences and factional politics

title: Education Budget will grow every year, says Telangana CM Revanth Reddy
content: Allocations to the sector would be gradually increased to 15% of the annual Budget, says Reddy, also the Education Minister, while launching the ‘Exclusive Education Week’ celebrations in Hyderabad; also unveils ₹1,700-crore infrastructure works for integrated school complexes, additional classrooms and pre-primary sections in government schools

title: Most drowning cases occur in summer: Fire dept.
content: ‘Around 90% of drowning cases occur during summer vacation, and 95% of victims are students venturing into dangerous waters to swim or learn swimming’

title: 35 injured as bus, lorry collide in Aluva
content: The bus was heading from Aluva to Pookkattupady and the lorry was travelling in the opposite direction when they reportedly collided on a narrow road

title: CSML tasked with DPR for model road project
content: The road project was among the 21 priority initiatives identified by the new civic administration for its first 50 days in office. It will be implemented in three phases

title: "Speculative, Misleading": Pak On Report Claiming It Is Shielding Iran Jets From US Strikes
content: The ministry claimed that several Iranian and US aircraft had arrived in the country after the ceasefire and during the initial round of Islamabad talks to support the movement of diplomatic personnel, security teams and administrative staff.

title: Not Missiles, But Energy Resilience: The Unexpected Winners Of Iran War
content: While energy-secure nations found room to manoeuvre, several oil-dependent economies absorbed the harshest shock of the Iran war.

title: Tamil Nadu Government Formation LIVE Updates: TVK MLA JCD Prabhakar Elected Tamil Nadu Assembly Speaker
content: Vijay's oath ceremony, which took place on Sunday, came after four days of protracted political negotiations after his party received an unprecedented mandate that split open the binary politics that Tamil Nadu has been witnessing for over 50 years

title: 1 In 4 Americans Believe Trump Dinner Shooting Was Staged: Survey
content: The survey also found that roughly one-third of Democrats held similar views, compared with about 1 in 8 Republicans.

title: Gelatin Sticks Found Along PM's Route Near Bengaluru: Fresh Details Emerge
content: On the day of the event, a threat call was made to the Koramangala Police Station, with the caller allegedly claiming that blasts would be carried out near HAL airport and the Art of Living Ashram.

title: Trump Weighs Two Iran War Options With Ceasefire "On Massive Life Support"
content: Trump wants a permanent peace deal to end the war, but officials said that Tehran's rejection of many of the US demands and refusal to make concessions regarding its nuclear programme has put the military option back on the table.

title: US May Propose Currency Swap Deal With China To Boost Dollar: Report
content: Rising debt levels and the expanding use of sanctions in foreign policy have triggered debate over the long-term strength of the US dollar as the world’s reserve currency.

title: Andhra Deputy Speaker Demands Action Against "Unregulated Use Of Speakers"
content: Andhra Pradesh Legislative Assembly Deputy Speaker urges police to enforce noise pollution laws against loudspeaker misuse.

title: Catcalled, Beaten, Clothes Torn: Morning Tea Horror For 2 Women In Delhi
content: The women alleged that one of them was molested and her clothes were torn, while the accused uttered racist slurs and even attacked them with a bamboo stick while they were trying to escape.

title: PM Modi Welcomes Move To Implement Ayushman Bharat Scheme In West Bengal
content: West Bengal's new BJP government will implement Ayushman Bharat providing health insurance to eligible households.

title: US-Iran War News LIVE Updates: Ceasefire At Risk As Iran Rejects US Plan, Trump Calls Response 'Garbage'
content: US-Iran Ceasefire Live Updates: A US admiral said US forces sank six small Iranian ships. Iran denied any had been sunk and earlier fired warning shots at US warships

title: 4 Ministers, Including NDA Allies, To Take Oath With Himanta Sarma Today
content: The National Democratic Alliance (NDA) returned to power for a third consecutive term, securing 102 seats in the 126-member Assam Legislative Assembly.

title: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang Excluded From Trump's China Visit: Report
content: A number of CEOs were expected to travel with Trump to help drum up business for US companies, a top priority for his administration.

title: Pakistan Let Iran Park Jets At Nur Khan Airbase To Shield From US Strikes: Report
content: Among the military hardware that was sent to Pakistan was an Iranian Air Force RC-130, a reconnaissance and intelligence-gathering variant of the Lockheed-produced C-130 Hercules tactical transport aircraft

title: Trusted Congress Face To Key BJP Strategist: Himanta Sarma's Political Journey
content: After joining the BJP in 2015, Himanta Biswa Sarma quickly grew from a regional face to one of the key strategists in the Northeast.

title: Assam Chief Minister Oath Ceremony LIVE Updates: Himanta Biswa Sarma To Be Sworn In
content: Assam Oath Ceremony LIVE Updates: Along with Himanta Biswa Sarma, four ministers - two from the BJP and one each from its allies Asom Gana Parishad (AGP) and Bodoland People's Front (BPF) - will also be sworn in.

title: AIADMK faction extends support to Vijay's TVK; leader explains why DMK alliance talks collapsed
content: The TOI News Desk comprises a dedicated and tireless team of journalists who operate around the clock to deliver the most current and comprehensive news and updates to the readers of The Times of India worldwide. With an unwavering commitment to excellence in journalism, our team is at the forefront of gathering, verifying, and presenting breaking news, in-depth analysis, and insightful reports on a wide range of topics.
